postReview.title: Denkey brace leads Cincinnati to Eastern Conference summit
postReview.description: Kevin Denkey's brace guided FC Cincinnati to a win against Sporting Kansas City, while Alonso Martinez netted for New York City FC.

preReview.title: Cincinnati v Sporting Kansas City: Noonan acknowledges 'strange time' after Vermes' departure
preReview.description: Sporting Kansas City face FC Cincinnati on Saturday for Kerry Zavagnin's fourth game as interim coach following Peter Vermes' exit.
